title: Zustand app store (today, stats, subscription, onboarding selections)

task.description: Create a single zustand store holding today list state, stats state, subscription tier cache, and onboarding selected recommendation IDs. Expose typed actions for load, toggle, refresh flows; wire minimal state transitions without UI.
acceptance_criteria: AC1: Store exports useAppStore with typed state for: todayItems, todayStatus, statsStatus, subscription, onboardingSelectedIds.
AC2: Actions exist with stable signatures: bootstrap(), loadToday(date), toggleToday(habitId,date), refreshAll(date) returning Promise<void>.
AC3: Store initializes subscription to {tier:'free', expiresAt:null} and lists to empty arrays without throwing.
AC4: No screen imports from repos directly are required to compile; screens can call store actions only.
AC5: App compiles with the new store and strict TS has 0 errors in the added/edited files.

definition_of_done: No async action throws uncaught errors (catch and store error string).
All state fields have explicit types; no implicit any.
